channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jesse Ramien scores the opening try for Cronulla Sharks against the Warriors in Auckland
item.description: Jesse Ramien provided the first major moment of the NRL clash between the Cronulla Sharks and the New Zealand Warriors in Auckland, crossing the line to score the opening try of the match. The article...

item.title: Trump Says He Could Seek Greater Federal Control of Washington, D.C., if Socialist Candidate Wins Mayoral Primary
item.description: President Donald Trump stated that he could pursue greater federal control over Washington, D.C., if democratic socialist candidate Janeese Lewis George wins the upcoming Democratic primary for mayor....

item.title: Federal Judge Dismisses University of Florida College Republicans' Free Speech Lawsuit
item.description: A federal judge has dismissed a lawsuit brought by a University of Florida College Republicans group that claimed the university violated its First Amendment rights when it removed the organization fr...

item.title: Sam Ferris Discusses a Decade of Documenting Sydney Through Atmospheric Street Photography
item.description: In this LensCulture interview, Australian photographer Sam Ferris reflects on the development of his long-term street photography project, In Visible Light, which documents Sydney’s central business d...

item.title: ACT budget shows deficit reduction but long-term fiscal challenges remain
item.description: The article compiles several Letters to the Editor responding to the ACT Government’s latest budget, highlighting cautious optimism alongside significant concern about the territory’s financial future...

item.title: Report Says White House Expanded Chris Klomp's Role at HHS Amid Concerns Over Kennedy's Leadership
item.description: According to a report cited by Raw Story and based on information from Politico, the White House quietly promoted Chris Klomp to serve as chief counselor at the Department of Health and Human Services...

item.title: Tanzania Proposes 62.3 Trillion Shilling Budget to Strengthen Domestic Revenue and Reduce Dependence on External Funding
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has presented a proposed budget of 62.3 trillion Tanzanian shillings, highlighting a national strategy focused on greater fiscal self-reliance and reduced dependence on fore...

item.title: The 1963 U.S. Tour of the Mona Lisa Drew Millions Under Extraordinary Security
item.description: In 1963, Leonardo da Vinci’s Mona Lisa was exhibited in the United States for the first time as part of a landmark cultural exchange between France and the United States. The tour resulted from diplom...

item.title: Trump Legal Team Defends $1.8 Billion Anti-Weaponization Fund Against Effort to Reopen IRS Settlement Case
item.description: Attorneys representing President Donald Trump, his sons, and the Trump Organization have asked a federal judge in the Southern District of Florida to reject an attempt to reopen a previously dismissed...

item.title: CNN Panel Debates Trump's Reported Interest in Renaming the Kennedy Center During Heated Exchange
item.description: A discussion on CNN turned contentious when conservative commentator Scott Jennings defended President Donald Trump's involvement with the Kennedy Center and criticism surrounding reports that Trump s...

item.title: Legal Expert Questions Trump's Description of Strike Against Alleged Tren de Aragua Leader
item.description: A legal expert has raised concerns about President Donald Trump's announcement of a U.S. military operation that reportedly killed the leader of Tren de Aragua, a Venezuelan criminal organization. Tru...

item.title: Commentator Criticizes Reported Iran Proposal, Calling It Politically Damaging for Trump
item.description: A Raw Story article highlights comments made by Michael Weiss, an editor at Insider, regarding reported details of a potential agreement between the United States and Iran. According to information at...

item.title: Japan Successfully Launches the First H3-30 Rocket Variant on Test Mission Carrying Six Small Satellites
item.description: Japan’s space agency, JAXA, successfully launched the eighth H3 rocket on June 12, 2026, in the Flight 6 (F6) mission from the Yoshinobu Launch Complex at the Tanegashima Space Center. The mission was...

item.title: Texas GOP convention criticized after live elephant incident draws mockery and animal welfare concerns
item.description: At a recent Texas Republican Party convention, an unusual promotional moment involving a live elephant intended to support Governor Greg Abbott's re-election campaign sparked widespread attention and ...

item.title: AJK protesters regroup at sit-in sites after overnight dispersal claims
item.description: In Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK), supporters and activists of the proscribed Joint Awami Action Committee (JAAC) regrouped in large numbers at protest sites in Rawalakot after initially dispersing over...

item.title: Strategist Predicts Major Changes at CNN Following DOJ Approval of Paramount-Skydance Warner Bros. Acquisition
item.description: Political strategist Chai Komanduri argued during an appearance on MS NOW that CNN could face significant editorial and personnel changes following the U.S. Department of Justice's approval of Paramou...

item.title: Canberra teenage footballers selected for AFL national talent pathway tournament
item.description: The article is part of The Canberra Times' live Canberra sports coverage for Saturday, 13 June 2026. The main focus is on two young Australian Rules football players from Canberra who have attracted t...

item.title: Ben Domenech warns Republicans about potential Senate vulnerabilities ahead of midterms
item.description: Ben Domenech, opinion editor at the right-leaning Daily Wire and husband of Meghan McCain, offered a cautious assessment of Republican prospects in upcoming U.S. Senate races during an interview with ...

item.title: Study finds alcohol may increase cravings for savoury ultra-processed foods through protein appetite mechanisms
item.description: A new Australian study has explored why people often crave savoury snacks such as chips, nachos and salted nuts when drinking alcohol. Researchers found that alcohol may stimulate a biological appetit...

item.title: GOP aides criticize White House strategy and leadership approach ahead of midterms
item.description: A June 2026 report highlights growing frustration among Republican congressional aides toward the Trump White House as the U.S. midterm elections approach. According to reporting cited from the Daily ...
